title: ITALY enforcement action against Io e te s.r.l.s. (2,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on Io e te s.r.l.s.. The controller had installed video surveillance inside its business premises. The controller installed the video surveillance system in a way that allowed the business owner to access footage on his smartphone. The controller...
